pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 features and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5.x does not support Java 17; the application will fail to compile or start due to unsupported bytecode version and removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; without it, the project compiles for Java 8, causing runtime errors on JDK 17 due to missing modules or API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Guava version to 31.0.1-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain classes or methods incompatible with Java 17 module system or removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Database Rider core and spring modules to 1.23.0 for Java 17 and Spring Boot 2.6 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Database Rider versions may not support Java 17 or the newer Spring Boot test context.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class names in spring.factories to reflect the package rename from com.xpinjection.springboot to com.xpinjection.library.config.init.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to initialize auto-configuration components because the old class names no longer exist, resulting in ClassNotFoundException or NoSuchMethodError at startup.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class name for FailureAnalyzer in spring.factories to reflect the package rename.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to register the custom failure analyzer because the old class name is invalid, leading to startup errors or missing diagnostic capabilities.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class name for EnvironmentPostProcessor in spring.factories to reflect the package rename.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to apply environment post-processing because the old class name is invalid, causing configuration issues or startup failures.

src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.general_idea: Replace H2-specific identity column syntax with PostgreSQL-compatible BIGSERIAL primary key definition.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.why_exists: The syntax 'GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY' is not supported by PostgreSQL (the target DB for this migration), causing a runtime SQL syntax error during schema initialization.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.before: id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
